name: Carrot-Tofu Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the carrots until tender.
2. Blend together the tofu, water from the carrots, and sea salt in a bowl. Use enough water to obtain a thick, creamy consistency similar to mayonnaise or pudding. The amount of water needed will depend on the moisture content of the tofu.
3. Add the minced onion, dill seed, and chopped parsley to the blended tofu mixture. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Spread the tofu-carrot mixture evenly over the bottom of a 7-inch by 11-inch baking dish lined with the whole wheat pie crust.
5. Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the top of the filling.
6. Bake at 350°F for 35-45 minutes, or until set and golden brown on top.
